name: QAT Int5/Int6 + BigramHash(10240) + Backout + SWA50 + U-Net Skips
blurb: Quantization-Aware Training (straight-through estimator) with int5 MLP / int6 attention. BigramHash 10240, SmearGate, Backout (learned residual subtraction), U-Net skip connections, SVD embedding init. Simple Muon + compiled Newton-Schulz5. SWA every 50 steps (start_frac=0.4). 8% magnitude pruning + zstd-22.
author: gowtham0992
